name: Nan's Lemon Curd Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter and sugar together in a double boiler over low heat.
2. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
3. Gradually add the beaten eggs to the melted mixture while stirring constantly.
4. Add lemon juice and stir until well combined.
5. Pour into jars and allow to cool completely at room temperature before refrigerating.
